---
name: a11y
description: Run an accessibility audit across all component stories using the Storybook a11y addon.
---

# /a11y

Accessibility audit for `@resq-sw/ui` components.

## Steps

1. Run `bun storybook` to start Storybook.
2. In a second terminal, run `bun test-storybook --url http://localhost:6006` (if `@storybook/test-runner` is configured).
3. Report all `@axe-core/react` violations — categorise as CRITICAL, SERIOUS, MODERATE, MINOR.
4. CRITICAL and SERIOUS violations must be fixed before any PR merges.
5. For each violation: component name, story, WCAG criterion, and suggested fix.
